General.Name: Chi Kan Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Chi Kan Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of formwork and other construction services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It provides formwork services, including timber and plywood conventional formwork, and aluminum and steel prefabricated framework. The company also engages in the e-commerce business. Chi Kan Holdings Limited was formerly known as Chi Kan Woodworks Company Limited. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: China Shipbuilding Tower, Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong
